title: Petface Toyz Rope Ball Tugger Dog Toy
features: FUN PLAY: Entertaining rope ball tugger toy for dogs, encourages interactive play and provides mental stimulation
DURABLE & STIMULATING: Made to be strong and durable for hours of chewy fun, great for dental health too
VERSATILE TOY: Perfect for playing tug of war, fetch or simply letting your dog chew on to keep them entertained
HEALTHY HABITS: Keep your pet active with this stimulating toy that promotes dental health and satisfies their natural need to chew

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird for great, affordable products! Toyz by Petface Rope Ball Tugger Dog Toy This fun rope ball tugger from the Petface Toyz range is brightly coloured and perfect for outdoor use. This brightly coloured toy is made from a blend of durable and non-toxic synthetic materials that are not affected by the elements. With a knot at one end and a loop for your hand at the other end, this tugger is perfect for interactive fun with your dog. Petface Luxury Multi Squeak Dog Toy About Petface All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. Treat your pampered pooch! Treat your pampered pooch to this rope ball toy, perfect for tugging games. This fun toy can help to develop your pet's sense of play and exercise, helping them to stay fit and healthy. Your dog's best friend! Ideal for interactive play indoors or outdoors, the Toyz Rope Ball Tugger Dog Toy is great for throw and fetch or for keeping your dog amused when left to their own devices.
